error_signature: Your URL didn’t respond with the value of the challenge parameter
title: Slack URL verification failure
symptom: When attempting to verify the Slack request URL, the error 'Your URL didn’t respond with the value of the challenge parameter' is returned.
not_this_if: Running n8n without a reverse proxy
root_cause: Cloudflare may block or not properly forward the verification request from Slack to your n8n instance. This can prevent n8n from receiving the challenge parameter needed for verification.
fix_steps: Create tunnel rules in Cloudflare to allow Slack hooks
Ensure that the request is properly forwarded to your n8n instance
agent_instruction: Set up appropriate Cloudflare tunnel rules to allow Slack to reach your n8n instance.
